name: timelinize
description: Store your data from all your accounts and devices in a single cohesive timeline on your own computer
readme_summary: Timelinize is a self-hosted application that aggregates data from various sources like photos, chats, social media, and location history into a single, cohesive timeline on your own computer. It allows for deep data import and organization, enabling users to own and preserve their digital memories forever.
key_features: Data aggregation from diverse sources (photos, videos, chats, social media, location, contacts)
Self-hosted and user-owned data storage
Timeline visualization of imported data
3D map view with historical location data
Entity recognition and management (people, pets, organizations)
Custom file picker for data import
Data import from computers, phones, and online accounts
primary_use_case: To provide users with a private, self-hosted platform for archiving and visualizing all their digital data and memories in a chronological timeline.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old archivist, depicted as a friendly owl with spectacles, sits at a grand wooden desk overflowing with diverse artifacts: scattered photographs, glowing digital messages, old maps, and small, shimmering data streams. The owl is meticulously organizing these items onto a long, illuminated scroll that unfurls across the desk, forming a clear, chronological timeline. Subtle digital particles emanate from the artifacts, representing data being processed. In the background, a stylized, minimalist representation of a personal computer glows softly, labeled 'Timelinize'. The scene is rendered in a warm, inviting 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on rich textures and a soft, ambient glow, emphasizing the preservation and organization of personal digital history.

name: kill-ai-slop
description: A field guide to the visual & copy tics of AI-generated products — and an Agent Skill that scans your project and strips them out. https://killaislop.com
readme_summary: Kill AI Slop is a project that identifies and helps remove common visual and copy design 'tics' often found in AI-generated products. It offers a multilingual website cataloging these tells with interactive demos and an Agent Skill that scans codebases to detect and suggest fixes for these AI-generated patterns.
key_features: Multilingual field guide website cataloging 33 AI-slop tells
Interactive before→after demos for each tell
Agent Skill (`kill-ai-slop`) to scan projects for AI-generated code signals
Proposes or applies code-level fixes for detected tells
Scanner can be run directly via command line
Supports custom rules and path exclusions
Uses `deslop-ignore` comment directives to suppress false positives
primary_use_case: To help developers and designers identify and eliminate common, often unintentional, AI-generated design patterns and copy tics in their web projects, leading to cleaner, more human-like products.
cover_image_prompt: A meticulous artisan, dressed in a clean, minimalist style, carefully chiseling away rough, overly-embellished digital 'stone' blocks that are emitting faint, generic glowing patterns. The artisan is replacing these with smooth, refined blocks that have subtle, unique textures. In the background, a digital blueprint shows a clean, elegant design transforming from a cluttered, gradient-filled mess. Small, unobtrusive UI elements showing code snippets and 'AI Slop Detected' warnings are visible on a nearby workbench. The scene is bathed in soft, natural light, emphasizing clarity and craftsmanship. The style is a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on tactile detail and a clean, modern aesthetic.

name: pocket_disasm
description: Multi-session IDALib MCP router for coding agents. Analyze multiple binaries in parallel with IDA-compatible reverse engineering tools.
readme_summary: Pocket Disasm is a Python-based control layer for headless binary analysis using IDA Pro's MCP toolset. It allows coding agents to manage multiple, isolated IDALib sessions concurrently through a single HTTP endpoint, without requiring interactive IDA GUI instances.
key_features: Single MCP endpoint for multiple IDALib sessions
True multi-session analysis with independent IDALib processes
Parallel agent workflows for simultaneous binary analysis
IDA Pro MCP compatibility via pinned ida-pro-mcp
Agent-managed sessions for opening and switching binaries
Built-in integrations for coding agents and IDEs
No IDA GUI automation required
Persistent diagnostics logging
Self-update support
primary_use_case: Enabling coding agents and LLMs to perform parallel, headless binary analysis on multiple files simultaneously using IDA Pro's IDALib, managed through a unified MCP endpoint.
cover_image_prompt: A conductor orchestrating a symphony of isolated, glowing binary code streams, each flowing into its own distinct, transparent analysis chamber. The conductor, representing the Pocket Disasm agent, uses a digital baton to direct the flow and manipulation of code within each chamber. Subtle UI elements showing session IDs and analysis progress are visible on the chambers. In the background, a single, unified console displays the overall status, symbolizing the single MCP endpoint. The scene is set in a futuristic, clean laboratory with soft, ambient lighting, emphasizing control and parallel processing. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clear visual metaphors and a vibrant, tech-inspired color palette.

name: cursor-kit-for-ai
description: Production-ready templates for Cursor AI — DevOps, Backend, Automation. One CLI command, full stack in 20 seconds.
readme_summary: Cursor Kit for AI is a scaffolding library that provides production-ready project templates and plugins for developers using Cursor AI. It enables the rapid creation of full-stack applications, bots, and DevOps solutions with a single CLI command, significantly accelerating development.
key_features: Production-ready project templates
CLI for project creation and plugin management
Extensible plugin system for Cursor AI skills
Support for various stacks including FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, and Kubernetes
Rapid full-stack development (approx. 20 seconds)
primary_use_case: Accelerating the development of AI-powered applications and services by providing pre-configured, production-ready project structures and AI agent skills.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled architect standing at a blueprint table, holding a glowing cursor-shaped tool. With a single sweep of the tool, a complex, multi-layered city representing a full-stack application materializes from the blueprint. The city features distinct districts for backend services (represented by glowing servers), frontend interfaces (vibrant, interactive screens), and databases (solid, crystalline structures). Subtle digital particles and code snippets float around the architect, indicating the AI-powered nature of the creation process. The overall mood is one of rapid, intelligent construction. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and a vibrant color palette.

name: hh-ai-agent
readme_summary: This Python repository automates the job application process on HH.ru by using an AI agent to find relevant job postings, filter out unsuitable ones, and generate personalized cover letters. It integrates with Telegram for notifications and HR responses, and uses a local LLM (Llama 3) for intelligent filtering and writing.
key_features: Automated job searching and application on HH.ru
Intelligent filtering of job postings using LLM
Personalized cover letter generation
Cloudflare and HH.ru anti-blocking measures
Telegram integration for notifications and HR message forwarding
Local LLM (Llama 3) integration
Playwright for browser automation
primary_use_case: Automating the job application process on HH.ru by leveraging AI for intelligent filtering and personalized cover letter generation.
cover_image_prompt: A diligent robotic assistant meticulously sifting through a mountain of digital job postings, represented as glowing scrolls. The robot uses a magnifying glass that projects a personalized, glowing letter onto a selected scroll, symbolizing the AI-generated cover letter. In the background, a subtle Telegram chat interface shows successful applications and incoming HR messages. The scene is set in a clean, modern workspace with soft, ambient lighting, emphasizing efficiency and intelligence. Small, abstract data streams flow around the robot, hinting at the underlying AI and automation. The repository name 'HH.ru AI Agent' is subtly integrated into a digital display on the robot's arm. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style with a professional, approachable aesthetic.
